tool_args.label: East End Gateway / LIRR Concourse at Penn Station

payload.project_name: East End Gateway / LIRR Concourse at Penn Station
payload.status: Phase 1 completed December 2020; LIRR Concourse to be completed in 2023
payload.description: Improvements to LIRR Concourse at Penn Station including higher ceilings, wider corridors, better lighting, accessibility, wayfinding, and new retail. New entrance from Seventh Av and 33 St opened December 2020.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Highlight: East End Gateway / LIRR Concourse at Penn Station

MTA C&D is making a number of improvements to the LIRR Concourse at Penn Station, including higher ceilings, wider corridors, better lighting and air flow, accessibility improvements, more intuitive wayfinding, and new retail options
The new LIRR Concourse will be completed in 2023

payload.status: In negotiations with multiple developers; selection expected by summer 2021
payload.description: Transform 1.6-acre MTA-owned surface parking lot adjacent to LIRR Westbury station into new residential and retail development.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Highlight: Westbury Transit-Oriented Development
transform a 1.6-acre MTA-owned surface parking lot adjacent to the LIRR Westbury station into a new development project
A developer and development project should be selected by this summer

payload.description: Fortifying Clifton Shops and Yards infrastructure and equipment against heavy rainfall and storm surges. Building a new maintenance shop building. Staten Island-based facility inspects and maintains all SIR locomotives.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project Highlight: Clifton Shops and Yards
MTA C&D is fortifying Clifton Shops and Yards infrastructure and equipment against heavy rainfall and storm surges. The Staten Island-based facility
The new building is complete, including exterior roof, and HVAC systems. Also completed are: flood wall and storm retention tanks

tool_args.label: A+B Bidding Savings on Eighth Avenue CBTC
tool_args.raw_text: The project was solicited using A+B bidding to encourage bidders to minimize the use of track outages other authority supplied services. This process resulted in approximately $30 million in savings in support costs for MTA.

payload.claim_text: The project was solicited using A+B bidding to encourage bidders to minimize the use of track outages other authority supplied services. This process resulted in approximately $30 million in savings in support costs for MTA.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The project was solicited using A+B bidding to encourage bidders to minimize the use of track outages other authority supplied services. This process resulted in approximately $30 million in savings in support costs for MTA

tool_args.label: CBTC Projects Budget and Schedule Concerns
tool_args.raw_text: Overall, the four Signals & Train Controls projects presented have been subject to detailed review by C&D with consequent changes made to the management personnel and organization. Where possible, measures have been put in place to mitigate past performance but these measures, along with COVID impacts, are unlikely to be sufficient to bring all projects back within their original budget and schedule.

payload.claim_text: measures have been put in place to mitigate past performance but these measures, along with COVID impacts, are unlikely to be sufficient to bring all projects back within their original budget and schedule

evidence_refs.source_quote: measures have been put in place to mitigate past performance but these measures, along with COVID impacts, are unlikely to be sufficient to bring all projects back within their original budget and schedule
